title: Quick chocolate mousse

html:
Quick chocolate mousse

Ingredients

  • 1 box instant chocolate pudding mix
  • 30 ml cocoa powder
  • 1 l cream

Method

  1. Mix the chocolate pudding and cocoa powder
  2. Add 750 ml cream and whip with an electric mixer until nice and fluffy
  3. Spoon into a glass
  4. Whip the remaining cream and put on top. Put in the fridge
  5. Decorate with cherries or any grated chocolate
